title: lithocarpus oogyne
intro: Lithocarpus oogyne, also known as the Himalayan beech, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which can help alleviate various health issues. Its medicinal properties include reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory problems, providing several health benefits such as improved immune function, reduced inflammation, and enhanced overall well-being. Lithocarpus oogyne is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are made by steeping the leaves, bark, or roots in hot water to extract its medicinal compounds.
